description: Orient an entity by writing entity.rotation (radians) each tick — the data path to a directional sprite now that the renderer honors rotation (0.3.2). Modes: velocity (point along travel), target (track the nearest tagged entity), pointer (twin-stick aim at the cursor), tilt (bank by a velocity axis, e.g. a flyer pitching with vertical speed). Visual only; collision stays axis-aligned.

offset.description: Radians added to the computed angle, to correct sprite art that doesn't point +x.

minSpeed.description: In 'velocity' mode, hold facing below this speed (px/s).

tiltPerVel.description: In 'tilt' mode, radians of bank per px/s of the chosen axis.

maxTilt.description: In 'tilt' mode, clamp magnitude in radians (0 = unclamped).
